overview: A modern personal portfolio website for freelance web designer Akela Bhai. Features a dark theme with gradient accents, smooth animations, and a clean premium look across hero, about, services, portfolio, testimonials, and contact sections.
features: Full-viewport hero with name, tagline, and CTA button
About section with profile image and bio
Services grid with 4 service cards and hover effects
Portfolio showcase with project cards in a modern grid layout
Client testimonials with photos, names, and feedback
Contact form with email, phone, and social media links
Sticky navigation with mobile hamburger menu
Dark theme with gradient accents and smooth animations throughout
